findings.title: CVE-2026-40050 — CrowdStrike LogScale Self-Hosted Unauthenticated Path Traversal (CVSS 9.8)
findings.summary: Unauthenticated cluster-API path traversal in CrowdStrike LogScale Self-Hosted lets remote attackers read arbitrary files; full technical detail and version range published 2026-04-25 after vendor-only advisory on 2026-04-21.

findings.title: UNC6692 'SNOW' Modular Toolset — Microsoft Teams Helpdesk Impersonation Reaches Domain Controllers
findings.affected_technology: Microsoft Teams external federation + Chromium browser-extension persistence
findings.summary: Mandiant detailed UNC6692 chaining email-bombing into Teams 'IT helpdesk' impersonation that delivers SNOWBELT/SNOWGLAZE/SNOWBASIN, dumps LSASS and reaches domain controllers; targeting was 77% senior employees in March–April 2026.

findings.title: BlackFile Vishing Extortion Campaign — Retail and Hospitality Targeted via Salesforce/SharePoint API Exfiltration
findings.summary: Unit 42 + RH-ISAC disclosed BlackFile, a vishing-led extortion cluster active since February 2026 against retail/hospitality, bypassing MFA via self-enrollment, exfiltrating via Salesforce/SharePoint APIs and swatting executives.

noted.summary: ESET disclosed China-aligned cluster active since 2023, Mongolian government primary target plus dozens others; abuses Slack/Discord/Microsoft Graph/file.io for C2 with Go-based backdoors LaxGopher/RatGopher/BoxOfFriends/SSLORDoor.

Symantec observed Trigona affiliates switch to bespoke uploader_client.exe for parallel exfil and BYOVD chain (HRSword + tooling to terminate PCHunter/Gmer/YDark/WKTools/DumpGuard) replacing Rclone/MegaSync.
High-severity Windows-only flaw enabling junction-based arbitrary file deletion that can escalate to SYSTEM code execution; local exploitation only, fixed in Nessus 10.11.4 / Agent 11.1.3.
Wave of malicious apps mimicking Bitpie, Coinbase, MetaMask, Trust Wallet harvesting crypto seed phrases discovered on Apple App Store (2026-04-24); mobile-only, out of standard scope.
iOS 26.4.2 ships fix for Signal notification-database recovery issue covered last week; mobile-only follow-up to prior coverage.
Mastodon hit by DDoS on 2026-04-22 attributed to the same campaign that targeted Bluesky earlier this month; mitigated within hours, no enterprise action required.
Luxury cosmetics group Rituals disclosed customer-data breach 2026-04-23; consumer impact, tracked alongside BlackFile/ShinyHunters extortion ecosystem activity.
41-nation cyber defence exercise concluded 2026-04-24; not a vulnerability, context only for engagement with state CERTs.
